subject: Coordination brief: labrador activities around Vancouver | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-8909
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of labrador work in Vancouver. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Frida Kahlo. Reference initiative INIT-8909. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: readiness, delivery.
